steps.title: Use the stated reason
steps.content: The passage directly says Don Mariano moved the furniture because he wanted a long space to walk. It also describes him as deep in unpleasant thought.

steps.title: Connect walking and thinking
steps.content: B invents furniture disposal, C invents a motive about family, and D overstates the movement as vigorous exercise. The supported reason is that a clear walking path helps him continue his troubled reflection. The answer is A.
